name: Metal and Rubber Wood Lazy Susan Turntable Organizer White - Brightroom™
description:
Keep a variety of essentials organized and accessible with this Metal and Rubber Wood Lazy Susan Turntable Organizer from Brightroom™. This stylish organizer features a 9.5-inch white rotating tray with raised edges on a brown wooden base. The smooth spinning action makes reaching items a breeze, while the raised edges prevent items from sliding off, making this organizer ideal for spices, condiments, toiletries or craft supplies.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
